memoryArtifacts.headline: BIO
memoryArtifacts.description:
BIO:  Count of Exemes and Soissons, Eu, and Troyes.  Rebelled as was deprived; went to France.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Comte Guillaume Bussac d'Eu於1019年出生在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利艾時，他的父親Guillaume comte d'Eu et d'Hiémois39歲，母親Lasseline De Harcourt44歲。他與Adélaïde de Soissons Comtesse de Troyes結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於從1076年到1082年在法國阿奎泰道多哈帕格-吉方泰。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Comte Guillaume Bussac d'Eu于1019年出生在法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利艾时，他的父亲Guillaume comte d'Eu et d'Hiémois39岁，母亲Lasseline De Harcourt44岁。他与Adélaïde de Soissons Comtesse de Troyes结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于从1076年到1082年在法国阿奎泰道多哈帕格-吉方泰。

nameMeanings.name: d'Eu
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Indian: variant of   Deo  . In Maharashtra, Konkanastha Brahmins have a clan called Dev.

variants.name: Deo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ravindra, Sohini, Vivek, Ajay, Alok, Anil, Annapurna, Daya, Ganga, Goutam, Harnek, Indra.

Indian (northern states): from Sanskrit deva ‘deity, lord’. This was a title used by ruling families in northern India. There is a Jat tribe called Deo. In northeastern India this name is spelled and pronounced Deb . Elsewhere, a common variant is Dev .
Italian: from a short form of the personal names Amadeo, Laudadeo, or Sperindeo, of which only the first now remains in use as a personal name.

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: Bussac
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of an unidentified German surname, most likely   Bussen  .
History: Felix Bussan, born in Germany, arrived in New York in 1897, on board the Normannia. Willy Bussan, born in Germany, left Hamburg on board the Deutschland and arrived in New York in 1907.

variants.name: Bussen
meanings: German: from the genitive form of   Busse   1.

en.lifeSummary: When Comte Guillaume Bussac d'Eu was born in 1019, in Eu, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France, his father, Guillaume comte d'Eu et d'Hiémois, was 39 and his mother, Lasseline De Harcourt, was 44. He married Adélaïde de Soissons Comtesse de Troyes. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 7 daughters. He died from 1076 to 1082, in Champagne-et-Fontaine, Dordogne, Aquitaine, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Comte Guillaume Bussac d'Eu est né en 1019, à Eu, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France, son père, Guillaume comte d'Eu et d'Hiémois, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Lasseline De Harcourt, avait 44 ans. Il a épousé Adélaïde de Soissons Comtesse de Troyes. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé du 1076 au 1082, à Champagne-et-Fontaine, Dordogne, Aquitaine, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Comte Guillaume Bussac d'Eu 1019 in Eu, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guillaume comte d'Eu et d'Hiémois 39 und seine Mutter Lasseline De Harcourt 44. Er hat Adélaïde de Soissons Comtesse de Troyes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb von 1076 bis 1082 in Champagne-et-Fontaine, Dordogne, Aquitaine, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Comte Guillaume Bussac d'Eu è nato il nel 1019 nel Eu, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Guillaume comte d'Eu et d'Hiémois, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Lasseline De Harcourt, aveva 44 anni. Lui sposato Adélaïde de Soissons Comtesse de Troyes. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 7 figlie. Morì da 1076 a 1082, nel Champagne-et-Fontaine, Dordogne, Aquitaine, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Comte Guillaume Bussac d'Euが1019年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメエウで生まれた時，父Guillaume comte d'Eu et d'Hiémoisは39歳，母Lasseline De Harcourtは44歳であった。Adélaïde de Soissons Comtesse de Troyesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼はから1076年まで1082年にフランスアクイティアインドールドグンチャンプアグネ-エト-フォンティアインで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Comte Guillaume Bussac d'Eu(이)가 1019년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 우에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guillaume comte d'Eu et d'Hiémois(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Lasseline De Harcourt(은)는 44세였다. 그는 Adélaïde de Soissons Comtesse de Troyes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1076년 부터 1082년 까지 프랑스 아키테인 도르도그니 챔파그니-트-폰테인에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Comte Guillaume Bussac d'Eu nasceu em 1019, em Eu, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França, seu pai, Guillaume comte d'Eu et d'Hiémois, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Lasseline De Harcourt, tinha 44 anos. Ele casou-se com Adélaïde de Soissons Comtesse de Troyes. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu de 1076 a 1082, em Champagne-et-Fontaine, Dordogne, Aquitaine, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Comte Guillaume Bussac d'Eu родился в 1019 г. в местности эу, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Guillaume comte d'Eu et d'Hiémois было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Lasseline De Harcourt, 44. Он женился на женщине по имени Adélaïde de Soissons Comtesse de Troyes. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 7 дочерей. Он умер с 1076 по 1082 в местности чампагне-ет-фонтеин, дордогн, аквитеин, Франция.

sm.from 1076 to 1082: mai le 1076 e o'o I le 1082

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Comte Guillaume Bussac d'Eu nació en 1019, en Eu, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Guillaume comte d'Eu et d'Hiémois, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Lasseline De Harcourt, tenía 44 años. Se casó con Adélaïde de Soissons Comtesse de Troyes. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió desde 1076 hasta 1082, en Champagne-et-Fontaine, Dordogne, Aquitaine, Francia.
